home.noEventsMsg: More coming soon — giveaways, raffles and happy hours return regularly.
home.heroSubtitle: Collect Ghost Tokens, redeem them for real rewards, climb the ranking. The official community portal of streamer Gh0s77tt.

shop.title: SHOP
shop.subtitle: Exchange Ghost Tokens for keys, skins, subs and rewards you won't find anywhere else.
shop.emptyMsg: Nothing here yet — check another category or come back later. The catalog grows with the empire.

authError.title: SIGN-IN ERROR
authError.errConfiguration: Server configuration error. Please contact an administrator.
authError.errAccessDenied: Access denied. Your account may be banned — contact an administrator on Discord.
authError.errVerification: The verification link has expired or is invalid.
authError.errEmailCreateAccount: Could not create the email account.
authError.errOAuthAccountNotLinked: An account with this email is already linked to another provider.

polls.title: POLLS
polls.subtitle: Vote in community decisions. You can change your vote while the poll is open.
polls.emptyMsg: There are no polls right now. Check back later!

welcome.metaDesc: One token economy for Twitch, Kick, YouTube and Discord. Collect Ghost Tokens, redeem them for rewards.
welcome.sub2: Earn Ghost Tokens for activity, redeem them for real rewards, compete and win events.
welcome.hlTokensDesc: Earn GT for chat, voice, subs, donations and quests — on every platform.
welcome.hlRewardsDesc: Redeem tokens in the shop: Steam keys, skins, gifted subs, voice with Ghost.
welcome.hlCompeteDesc: Rankings, events, predictions, battle pass and seasonal rewards.
welcome.hlBotDesc: Twitch + Kick + YouTube: commands, timers, greetings, song requests, overlay.

signin.title: SIGN IN
signin.subtitle: Choose a platform to access your profile, shop and ranking.
signin.descTwitch: Link your Twitch account — subscription tracking
signin.descDiscord: Link Discord — role sync and Ghost Tokens
signin.errOAuthSignin: Couldn't start sign-in with the provider — usually a missing / wrong key in env (e.g. TWITCH_CLIENT_ID/SECRET in Vercel).
signin.errOAuthCallback: Error returning from the provider — check the Redirect URI in the developer console (must be /api/auth/callback/<provider>).
signin.errOAuthCreateAccount: Couldn't create an account from this provider.
signin.errOAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already linked to another platform — sign in with the one you used first.
signin.errAccessDenied: Access denied (account banned or consent withheld).
signin.errConfiguration: Sign-in configuration error on the server side.
signin.redirectHint: Paste EXACTLY this Redirect URI in the developer console (Twitch / Kick / Discord / Google):
signin.footerAccept: By signing in you accept the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

predictions.subtitle: Bet on stream events with Ghost Tokens. The winning option splits the entire pot (including losers' stakes) proportionally to the GT wagered.
predictions.emptyMsg: The streamer will add a new bet when it gets hyped 🎲
predictions.alreadyWagered: You wagered {gt} GT on option #{n}. Wait for the resolution.
